quicksight.refreshschedule.CfnAbout: Creates a refresh schedule for a dataset in Amazon QuickSight.

quicksight.refreshschedule.AwsAccountId.Description: The AWS account ID of the account that you are creating a schedule in.

quicksight.refreshschedule.DataSetId.Description: The ID of the dataset that you are creating a refresh schedule for.

quicksight.refreshschedule.Schedule.Description: The refresh schedule of a dataset.
